rounds.clue: Variety of emotions depicted in a simple yet striking visual arrangement.
Reaching for the sky’s dangling fruit, wings of longing.
The torch flickered, a dying star against the vast, indifferent ocean as the hand slipped beneath the waves.
Unlocking inner thoughts and hidden truths.
The porcelain cat waited beneath the watchful deer, as if expecting the silence to answer.
A solo figure drifting in a desolate or ethereal environment.
Moonlit fever dream bleeding warmth into the night.
The carousel’s chipped paint and ghostly passengers hinted at forgotten joys and an ending that always returned.
